{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = 358th Year of the Damascan Calendar
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The current year is the [[358th Year of the Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
